response:
👋 Hello! Welcome to the **NAUB Enquiry Assistant**. I'm here to help you with information about Nigerian Army University Biu.

You can ask me about:
• 🎓 Admission requirements & JAMB
• 💰 School fees & payments
• 📚 Available programs & courses
• 🏠 Hostel accommodation
• 📅 Academic calendar
• 📞 Department contacts

What would you like to know today?

questions: what is Nigerian Army University Biu
what kind of university is NAUB
response:
🏫 **Nigerian Army University Biu (NAUB)**

NAUB is a federal military university located in **Biu, Borno State, Nigeria**, established by the Nigerian Army to provide quality education in a disciplined environment.

**Key Facts:**
• Founded: 2018
• Location: Biu, Borno State, Nigeria
• Type: Federal Military University
• Ownership: Nigerian Army
• Vision: To be a world-class university producing graduates of excellence

NAUB offers undergraduate and postgraduate programs across multiple faculties.

questions: how do I apply to NAUB
what do I need for admission
response:
🎓 **NAUB Admission Process**

**Step 1:** Register and write the **JAMB UTME** and choose NAUB as your institution

**Step 2:** Meet the **minimum JAMB cut-off score** for your chosen course (160+ generally)

**Step 3:** Purchase the **Post-UTME form** from the NAUB portal when screening is announced

**Step 4:** Sit for the **Post-UTME screening** exercise at NAUB

**Step 5:** Check the **admission list** on the JAMB portal and NAUB website

**Step 6:** If admitted, pay your **acceptance fee** and complete registration

📌 *Visit the Admissions Office or NAUB website for the current portal link.*

questions: what is the cut off mark
what JAMB score do I need
how many marks do I need in JAMB
response:
📊 **JAMB Cut-Off Marks for NAUB**

The general minimum JAMB cut-off for NAUB is **160**. However:

| Faculty | Minimum JAMB Score |
|---------|-------------------|
| Science & Technology | 180+ |
| Management Sciences | 160+ |
| Humanities & Social Sciences | 160+ |
| Engineering | 180+ |

⚠️ Meeting the cut-off does not guarantee admission. Post-UTME performance and aggregate are also considered.

📌 *Contact the Admissions Office for the most current cut-off marks.*

questions: how to apply for post utme
how to buy post utme form
response:
📝 **NAUB Post-UTME Screening**

**How to apply:**
1. Visit the NAUB admissions portal
2. Create an account with your JAMB registration number
3. Pay the screening fee (₦2,000–₦3,500)
4. Complete the form and print your screening slip
5. Appear at NAUB on your scheduled date

**Documents to bring:**
• JAMB result slip
• O'Level result (WAEC/NECO)
• Birth certificate
• 4 recent passport photographs
• Post-UTME screening slip

📌 *Check the NAUB official website for screening dates.*

questions: how to know if I am admitted
response:
✅ **Checking Your Admission Status**

**Option 1 – JAMB Portal:**
1. Visit jamb.gov.ng
2. Log in with your JAMB profile
3. Check admission status section

**Option 2 – NAUB Website:**
1. Visit the official NAUB website
2. Navigate to the Admissions section
3. Check published admission lists

**Types of Admission Lists:**
• **First Batch** – Main admission list
• **Second Batch** – Supplementary list
• **Direct Entry** – For HND/ND holders

⚠️ Admission is only valid after accepting via the JAMB CAPS portal within the deadline.

🎓 **Direct Entry (DE) Admission at NAUB**

Direct Entry allows holders of ND, HND, or A-Level certificates to gain admission into **200 Level**.

**Requirements:**
• Minimum Lower Credit in ND/HND in a relevant field
• JAMB Direct Entry registration
• 5 O'Level credits including English and Mathematics

**How to Apply:**
1. Register for Direct Entry through JAMB portal
2. Choose NAUB as your preferred institution
3. Apply for Post-UTME/DE screening when announced

📌 *For more details, visit the Admissions Office or NAUB website.*

💰 **NAUB School Fees Structure**

**Fresh Students (100 Level) — Approximate:**

| Item | Amount (₦) |
|------|------------|
| Tuition Fee | 100,000 – 150,000 |
| Acceptance Fee | 20,000 – 30,000 |
| Registration Fee | 10,000 |
| ID Card/Matriculation | 5,000 |
| Library Fee | 5,000 |
| Sports/Medical | 10,000 |
| **Estimated Total** | **~150,000 – 230,000** |

⚠️ These are approximate figures. Always confirm exact fees from:
• The NAUB Bursary Department
• Official fee schedule on the NAUB website

📞 *Bursary Department: Contact through the university switchboard*

✅ **Acceptance Fee — NAUB**

The acceptance fee is a **mandatory payment** confirming you accept your admission offer.

**Current Fee:** Approximately **₦20,000 – ₦30,000** (confirm from Admissions Office)

**How to Pay:**
1. Log into the NAUB student portal
2. Navigate to the payment section
3. Generate a Remita payment reference
4. Pay via bank, mobile app, or online
5. Upload your payment receipt

⏰ **Deadline:** Usually 4–6 weeks after admission list release. Missing the deadline may forfeit your admission slot.

💳 **Fee Payment Procedure at NAUB**

All payments are made through the **Remita platform** or the official NAUB student portal.

**Steps to Pay:**
1. Log in to the NAUB student portal
2. Select **'Make Payment'**
3. Choose the fee type
4. A **Remita RRR number** will be generated
5. Pay at any bank, via Remita mobile app, or online at remita.net
6. Upload your receipt/reference on the portal

**Payment Channels:**
• 🏦 Any commercial bank with the RRR
• 📱 Remita mobile app
• 💻 Internet banking

📌 *Keep your payment receipt. Contact Bursary for payment issues.*

🏛️ **Faculties at Nigerian Army University Biu**

1. **Faculty of Humanities & Social Sciences**
   English & Literary Studies, History, Mass Communication, Political Science

2. **Faculty of Management Sciences**
   Accounting, Business Administration, Economics, Banking & Finance

3. **Faculty of Science**
   Computer Science, Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Microbiology

4. **Faculty of Engineering & Technology**
   Computer Engineering, Electrical/Electronics Engineering

5. **Postgraduate School**
   Masters and PhD programs in select disciplines

📌 *For the updated list of departments, visit the NAUB website or contact the Academic Registry.*

questions: what can I study at NAUB
response:
📚 **Programs Offered at NAUB**

**Faculty of Science:**
• Computer Science (B.Sc) • Mathematics (B.Sc) • Physics (B.Sc)
• Chemistry (B.Sc) • Biology (B.Sc) • Microbiology (B.Sc)

**Faculty of Management Sciences:**
• Accounting (B.Sc) • Business Administration (B.Sc)
• Economics (B.Sc) • Banking & Finance (B.Sc)

**Faculty of Humanities & Social Sciences:**
• English & Literary Studies (B.A) • Mass Communication (B.Sc)
• History & International Studies (B.A) • Political Science (B.Sc)

**Engineering & Technology:**
• Computer Engineering (B.Eng) • Electrical/Electronics Engineering (B.Eng)

⚠️ *Verify with NAUB Academic Registry for the current complete list.*

⏳ **Program Duration at NAUB**

| Program Type | Duration |
|-------------|----------|
| Science & Engineering | **5 years** |
| Arts, Humanities & Social Sciences | **4 years** |
| Management Sciences | **4 years** |
| Law (LLB) | **5 years** |
| Direct Entry (200 Level entry) | **3–4 years** |
| Postgraduate (Masters) | **1.5–2 years** |
| PhD | **3–4 years minimum** |

📋 **O'Level Requirements for NAUB Admission**

**General Requirement:**
Minimum of **5 O'Level credits** (WAEC, NECO, or NABTEB) in **not more than 2 sittings**, including:
• ✅ **English Language** (compulsory for ALL courses)
• ✅ **Mathematics** (compulsory for Science, Engineering, Management)
• Plus **3 relevant subjects** based on your department

**By Faculty:**
🔬 *Science/Engineering:* Physics, Chemistry, Biology/Further Math
💼 *Management:* Economics, Commerce/Accounting, Government
📖 *Humanities:* Literature, Government/History, any Social Science

⚠️ *Awaiting results may be accepted, but full results required before clearance.*

🏠 **Hostel & Accommodation at NAUB**

**Hostel Fees (approximate):** ₦30,000 – ₦60,000 per session

**How to Apply for Accommodation:**
1. Log in to the NAUB student portal
2. Navigate to **Accommodation / Hostel**
3. Apply during the announced accommodation period
4. Pay hostel fee after allocation
5. Collect room key from the Hostel Management Office

**Important Notes:**
• Hostel space is **limited** — apply early
• Priority often given to fresh students (100 Level)
• Separate male and female blocks
• Students must abide by hostel rules

📞 *Contact the Student Affairs Division for hostel enquiries.*

📅 **NAUB Academic Calendar**

**First Semester:**
• Resumption: Usually **October/November**
• Lectures: 15 weeks
• Exams: **February/March**

**Second Semester:**
• Resumption: Usually **March/April**
• Lectures: 15 weeks
• Exams: **July/August**

| Activity | Approximate Period |
|----------|-------------------|
| Late Registration | First 2 weeks of semester |
| Exam Timetable Release | 2–3 weeks before exams |
| Result Release | 4–6 weeks after exams |

⚠️ *Always check the NAUB official website or notice boards for exact dates.*

📝 **Course Registration at NAUB**

**Steps:**
1. Log in to the **NAUB Student Portal**
2. Navigate to **Academic → Course Registration**
3. Select the current semester
4. Choose compulsory + elective courses
5. Ensure **school fees are paid** first
6. Submit and **print your course form**
7. Get signatures from Level Adviser and HOD
8. Return signed form to Academic Registry

**Important:**
• Register within the **first 2 weeks** (late fee: ₦5,000)
• Min credit load: **15 units/semester**
• Max credit load: **24 units/semester**
• You cannot sit exams for unregistered courses

📊 **Result Verification & Transcript at NAUB**

**Process:**
1. Visit the **Academic Registry** or log in to the student portal
2. Complete the Transcript/Verification Request Form
3. Pay the prescribed fee:
   - Internal Transcript: ~₦5,000
   - External/Official Transcript: ~₦10,000–₦20,000
4. Submit form with payment receipt
5. Allow **2–4 weeks** for processing

**Result Remark:**
• Apply within **2 weeks** of result release
• Fee: ~₦3,000 per course
• Submit to Academic Registry

📞 *Academic Registry: Contact through the university main line*

🔄 **Change of Course at NAUB**

**Eligibility:**
• Completed at least **one full academic session**
• Minimum CGPA of **2.5**
• Meet O'Level requirements for new course
• Available space in target department

**Process:**
1. Obtain **Change of Course Form** from Academic Registry
2. Get approval from your **current HOD**
3. Get approval from the **receiving HOD**
4. Submit to the **Dean of Students**
5. Final approval by **Vice Chancellor's office**
6. Pay administrative fee (~₦10,000)

⏰ *Applications typically accepted at the beginning of a new session.*

📖 **General Studies (GST) Courses at NAUB**

GST courses are **compulsory for ALL undergraduate students** regardless of faculty.

| Course Code | Title | Level |
|-------------|-------|-------|
| GST 101 | Communication in English | 100L |
| GST 102 | Logic, Philosophy & Human Existence | 100L |
| GST 111 | Nigerian People & Culture | 100L |
| GST 112 | History & Philosophy of Science | 100L |
| GST 201 | Entrepreneurship | 200L |
| GST 202 | Peace Studies & Conflict Resolution | 200L |
| GST 301 | Introduction to Computer | 300L |

**Note:** GST courses are typically **2 units each** and must be passed to graduate.

📚 **NAUB University Library**

**Location:** Central Library Building, NAUB Main Campus, Biu

**Hours:**
• Monday – Friday: **8:00 AM – 9:00 PM**
• Saturday: **9:00 AM – 5:00 PM**
• Sunday: **2:00 PM – 6:00 PM**

**Services:**
• Physical book borrowing (requires student ID)
• Reading/study rooms
• Online database access
• Photocopy and printing services

**Library Card:**
1. Visit with your **student ID card**
2. Complete registration form
3. Receive library card (free)

📌 *Up to 3 books borrowed for 2 weeks. Late returns attract daily fines.*

💻 **ICT Directorate — NAUB**

**Location:** ICT Building, NAUB Campus, Biu

**Services:**
• Student portal access and support
• Email account creation
• Campus internet and WiFi access
• Computer lab facilities
• Technical support for e-learning

**Computer Lab Hours:** Mon–Fri 8AM–6PM | Sat 9AM–2PM

**Common Issues:**
• Forgotten password → bring student ID to ICT
• Portal registration errors → contact ICT support
• Student email setup → visit ICT with your matric number

📧 *Email: ict@naub.edu.ng (verify on NAUB website)*

📍 **NAUB Campus Location**

**Address:**
Nigerian Army University Biu,
Biu, Borno State, Nigeria

**Getting There:**
🚌 *From Maiduguri:* Vehicle to Biu (~2–3 hours); NAUB is signposted on the Biu–Damboa road
🚌 *From Gombe:* Vehicle via Pindiga (~3–4 hours)

**Campus Layout:**
| Facility | Area |
|----------|------|
| Administrative Block | Main entrance |
| Faculty of Science | North block |
| Faculty of Management | East wing |
| Library | Central campus |
| ICT Building | Near admin block |
| Student Hostels | West residential area |
| Sports Complex | South end |

💰 **Bursary Department — NAUB**

**Services:**
• Fee payment processing
• Fee receipts and financial clearance
• Scholarship disbursement
• Payment verification
• Financial records management

**Location:** Bursary Building, NAUB Administrative Area
**Hours:** Monday – Friday, 8:00 AM – 4:00 PM

**Common Issues:**
• Payment not on portal → visit with Remita receipt (wait 24hrs first)
• Fee breakdown → visit Bursary Department
• Fee clearance letter → obtainable from Bursary

📌 *NEVER make cash payments to individuals. Always use official Remita portal.*

📋 **Admissions Office — NAUB**

**Location:** Administrative Block, NAUB Main Campus, Biu, Borno State
**Hours:** Monday – Friday, 8:00 AM – 4:00 PM

**Services:**
• Admission enquiries and verification
• Post-UTME processing
• Admission letter collection
• Direct Entry admissions
• Change of institution processing

**Contact:**
• NAUB Website: www.naub.edu.ng
• Email: admissions@naub.edu.ng *(verify current contact on website)*

📌 *For urgent matters, check NAUB official social media pages for announcements.*

📁 **Academic Registry — NAUB**

**Services:**
• Student academic records management
• Transcript processing
• Certificate collection
• Course registration support
• Result queries and remark applications
• Convocation/graduation processing

**Location:** Registry Building, NAUB Administrative Block
**Hours:** Monday – Friday, 8:00 AM – 4:00 PM

📌 *Always carry your student ID when visiting the Registry.*

🎓 **Student Affairs Division — NAUB**

**Services:**
• Student ID card issuance
• Welfare and counseling services
• Accommodation management
• Student discipline and grievances
• Extracurricular and sports activities
• Clubs and societies registration

**Student Clubs at NAUB:**
• Academic departmental associations
• Sports clubs (football, athletics, etc.)
• Religious bodies (Christian & Muslim associations)
• Cultural groups • Tech and innovation hubs

**Location:** Dean of Students' Office, Administrative Block
⏰ *Working hours: 8AM – 4PM*

🏭 **SIWES / Industrial Training (IT) at NAUB**

SIWES is **mandatory** for science, engineering, and some management students.

**When:** Usually at **200 Level or 300 Level** | Duration: **3–6 months**

**Steps:**
1. Obtain **IT placement letter** from your department
2. Source placement in an organization relevant to your field
3. Register your placement with the **IT Coordinator**
4. Maintain a **SIWES logbook** signed by your industry supervisor
5. Submit end-of-IT report and do a departmental presentation

**ITF Allowance:** ITF pays a small stipend during SIWES

📌 *Contact your departmental IT Coordinator for placement assistance.*

🎖️ **NYSC — National Youth Service Corps**

All NAUB graduates **under 30 years** at graduation are mandatorily mobilized for NYSC.

**Process:**
1. NAUB submits graduates' details to NYSC
2. Receive **NYSC call-up letter** via nysc.gov.ng
3. Register online on the NYSC portal
4. Proceed to orientation camp in your deployment state

**Exemption:** Above 30 years at graduation, or certain disability conditions

**Documents Required:**
• Original degree certificate • Official transcript
• Statement of Result • Birth Certificate • Valid passport

📌 *For NYSC mobilization issues, contact the NAUB Academic Registry.*

🎓 **Postgraduate Programs at NAUB**

**Programs Available:**
• Postgraduate Diploma (PGD) — 1 year
• Master of Science (M.Sc) — 18 months–2 years
• Master of Arts (M.A) — 18 months–2 years
• Doctor of Philosophy (PhD) — 3–4 years (select disciplines)

**Admission Requirements:**
• Minimum Second Class Lower (2:2) for Masters
• Good Masters degree for PhD
• Relevant undergraduate degree in the field

**How to Apply:**
1. Visit NAUB Postgraduate School or official website
2. Download/purchase application form
3. Submit with required documents
4. Attend screening/interview if invited

📞 *Contact the School of Postgraduate Studies for intake dates.*

🏆 **Scholarships & Financial Aid**

**Government Scholarships:**
• **Federal Scholarship Board (FSB):** fsb.gov.ng — open to Nigerian undergrads
• **Borno State Scholarship:** Check the Borno State Scholarship Board
• **State Government Scholarship:** Check your own state's scholarship board

**Corporate Scholarships:**
• MTN Foundation Scholarship
• NNPC/Shell/Chevron (engineering/science students)
• Central Bank of Nigeria (economics students)

**How to Know About NAUB Scholarships:**
• Watch NAUB notice boards and official website
• Register with the Students Affairs Division

📌 *Apply ONLY through official channels. Beware of scholarship scams.*

🎓 **Matriculation Ceremony — NAUB**

Matriculation is the **official ceremony** marking your formal entry into NAUB as a registered student.

**When:** Typically held **end of first semester** (November–December) for fresh students

**Requirements:**
• Completed course registration
• School fees paid and cleared
• Student ID card obtained

**What Happens:**
• Taking of the matriculation oath
• Signing the matriculation register
• Academic gown (provided/rented on the day)
• Official photographs

📌 *Check the NAUB academic calendar and notice boards for the exact date.*

🎓 **Convocation / Graduation at NAUB**

**Eligibility:**
• Completed all required credit hours
• CGPA meets minimum (typically 1.0+)
• No outstanding fees or library fines
• Cleared by Bursary, Library, and Academic Registry

**Process:**
1. Clear all departmental clearances
2. Submit clearance form to Academic Registry
3. Pay convocation fee (if applicable)
4. Register via the student portal
5. Collect academic gown on the designated day
6. Attend ceremony and receive your degree

📌 *Convocation is held annually. Check NAUB website for the date.*

questions: I can't log in to portal
response:
🖥️ **Student Portal Troubleshooting**

**Can't log in:**
• Use your **Matric Number** (not your name) as username
• Try the 'Forgot Password' link
• Clear browser cache and cookies
• Try Chrome browser

**Forgot Password:**
1. Click **'Forgot Password'** on the login page
2. Enter your registered email or matric number
3. Check your email for reset link
4. If no email → visit **ICT Directorate** with your student ID

**Payment not on portal:** Wait 24hrs, then visit Bursary with receipt

**ICT Support:**
📍 ICT Building, NAUB Campus
🕒 Monday – Friday, 8AM – 5PM

📌 *Never share your portal password with anyone.*

😊 You're welcome! I'm glad I could help.

If you have more questions about NAUB in the future, feel free to return anytime — I'm available **24/7**! 🌟

**Quick Tips:**
• Bookmark the NAUB official website for announcements
• Follow NAUB on social media for real-time updates
• For urgent matters, visit the relevant office during working hours (8AM–4PM)

Good luck with your studies at **Nigerian Army University Biu!** 🎓
